_comment: Sample scene demonstrating the framework: Evan uses a procedural placeholder sprite until assets/cutscenes/evan.png exists - drop the PNG in and set hframes/vframes/fps and it becomes a real flipbook, no other changes.

steps.name: Evan
steps.text: One wave in and you're still bolted together. I respect that.

steps.name: Evan
steps.text: Scrap's worth more than sentiment out here. Anything that isn't shooting, sell it to me.
